title: Tidy Up Section: Export Board List to Excel or CSV
excerpt: I think admins should have the ability to export a CSV  list of all the boards in the system to facilitate clean up. Date should include the board owner, creation date, last activity, number of automations and integratio…

posts.author: fbroder (Florence Broder)
posts.cookedHtml: I think admins should have the ability to export a CSV list of all the boards in the system to facilitate clean up. Date should include the board owner, creation date, last activity, number of automations and integrations. Old boards continue to use automations and eat at plans. I was only able to PDF the board list.
